mentions.note: Snack division struggling due to GLP-1 weight-loss drugs; CEO Raymon Magguire may take serious actions to reduce snack dependence; stock up $5 today on sector recovery.
Stock went insane; growth from snacks via price cuts; stock had huge run; be careful.
Consumer packaged goods hotty; tangible products; understable business; high demand; on HALO theme but good enough to buy.
February winner; prosaic brand with popular products; defensive play in tough market.
Second-best packaged food company; CEO Raul Magguire navigating GLP-1 drugs and processed food challenges better than peers; reports Thursday.
CEO Laguarta executing innovation (Gatorade fast hydration, Poppi, small-format Frito packs) and cost discipline; taking share from competitors on pricing; up $3+ today on beat and guide.
Gave up post-earnings gains like classic 1999 market; stuck sideways until sentiment shifts favorably.
